translations.![如果你測的夠細會發現以上效果，在CollectionView滑動中圖有部分已: ![If you test carefully, you will notice that in the above effect, when scrolling the CollectionView some images have partially slid out of the screen, pressing at this time will cause the above situation 😅](/assets/1ca246e27273/1*LBgSqm8CTdBPycGnuYNMkA.png)
translations.![我的設定如上圖](/assets/1ca246e27273/1*cIIVrN: ![My settings as shown in the above image](/assets/1ca246e27273/1*cIIVrNDdziBVJn4z_QsLJg.png)
translations.### [Deprecated]提升使用者體驗，現在就為您的 iOS APP 加: ### [Deprecated] Enhance User Experience by Adding 3D TOUCH Feature to Your iOS APP Now (Swift)
translations.#### 3D Touch能在APP中實做兩個項目，如下：\n\n: #### 3D Touch can be implemented in two features within an app, as follows:
translations.***iPhone 11 以上版本已取消 3D Touch 功能；改用 Hapt: ***iPhone 11 and later models have removed the 3D Touch feature; it is replaced by Haptic Touch, which is implemented differently.***
translations.**請注意！其中的註冊能3D Touch 的 View 這塊要放在 traitC: **Note! The registration for the 3D Touch-enabled View must be placed inside traitCollectionDidChange, not in “viewDidLoad” ( [please refer to this article](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/30007701/view-traitcollection-horizontalsizeclass-returning-undefined-0-in-viewdidload){:target="_blank"} )**
translations.- Background Blur on 3D Touch Press\n\n-:
- Background Blur on 3D Touch Press

- 3D Touch Peek ViewController Preview Window on Press

- 3D Touch press pops up a ViewController preview window, swipe up to reveal an options menu below

- 3D Touch Press and Release to Return to Window

- 3D Touch Press and Deep Press to Enter Target ViewController
translations.- UIApplicationShortcutItemIconFile: Use:
- UIApplicationShortcutItemIconFile: Use a custom icon (size: 35x35, monochrome), choose either this or UIApplicationShortcutItemIconType

- UIApplicationShortcutItemUserInfo: Additional info, e.g., [id:1]
translations.- [Required] UIApplicationShortcutItemTy:
- [Required] UIApplicationShortcutItemType: Identifier string used for decision-making in AppDelegate

- [Required] UIApplicationShortcutItemTitle: Option title

- UIApplicationShortcutItemSubtitle: Option subtitle
translations.3D Touch重壓住時跳出ViewController預覽視窗\n: 3D Touch Peek ViewController Preview Window on Press
translations.3D Touch重壓住時跳出ViewController預覽視窗，往上滑可在下方: 3D Touch press pops up a ViewController preview window, swipe up to add an options menu below
translations.3D Touch重壓後再用力進入目標ViewController\n: 3D Touch Press and Deep Press to Enter Target ViewController
translations.3D Touch重壓放開返回視窗\n: 3D Touch Press and Release to Return to Window
translations.> ***iPhone 11 and later models have rem: > ***iPhone 11 and later models have removed the 3D Touch feature; it is replaced by Haptic Touch, which is implemented differently.***
translations.> **Note! The registration for the 3D To: > **Note! The registration for the 3D Touch-enabled View must be placed inside traitCollectionDidChange, not in “viewDidLoad” ( [please refer to this article](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/30007701/view-traitcollection-horizontalsizeclass-returning-undefined-0-in-viewdidload){:target="_blank"} )**
translations.> Regarding where to add it, I encounter: > Regarding where to add it, I encountered many issues. Some online sources say to put it in viewDidLoad, others say in cellForItem, but both places sometimes cause it to fail or only work for some cells.
translations.A:列表視窗，可以是 UITableView 或 UICollectionVie: A: List view, which can be a UITableView or UICollectionView:
translations.UIApplicationShortcutItemIconFile : 使用自定: UIApplicationShortcutItemIconFile: Use a custom icon (size: 35x35, monochrome), choose either this or UIApplicationShortcutItemIconType
translations.[必填] UIApplicationShortcutItemType : 識別字: [Required] UIApplicationShortcutItemType: Identifier string used for decision-making in AppDelegate
translations.並在其中新增選單項目(Dictionary)，其中Key-Value的設定對應如: Add menu items (Dictionary) with the following key-value settings:
translations.其中第一項是應用最廣且效果最好的 (Facebook:動態消息內容預覽、Line: The first item is the most widely used and effective (Facebook: News Feed content preview, Line: sneak peek messages). The second item, App Shortcut Launch, currently has low usage according to data, so it is discussed last.
translations.其中還有今日的主角： **3D Touch功能**\n\n: Among them is today's main focus: **3D Touch feature**
A while ago, during some downtime in project development, I explored many interesting iOS features: [CoreML](../793bf2cdda0f/), [Vision](../9a9aa892f9a9/), [Notification Service Extension](../cb6eba52a342/), Notification Content Extension, Today Extension, Core Spotlight, Share Extension, SiriKit (some have been documented in articles, more to come🤣)
translations.功能展示如上圖1所示，ViewController 預覽功能支援\n\n: The feature demonstration is shown in Figure 1 above. The ViewController preview supports
translations.回傳空陣列表示不使用此功能。\n\n: Return an empty array to indicate this feature is not used.
translations.在 info.plist 中加入 UIApplicationShortcutIt: Add the UIApplicationShortcutItems key in info.plist, type Array
translations.在APP中加入 3D Touch的功能並不難，對使用者來說也會覺得很貼心❤；可以: Adding 3D Touch functionality in an app is not difficult and users will find it thoughtful ❤; it can be combined with design operations to enhance user experience. However, currently only the two functions mentioned above are available, and since iPhone 6s and below, iPads, and iPhone XR do not support 3D Touch, the practical features are even fewer, mainly serving as an aid to enhance the experience.
translations.在AppDelegate中新增處理的 Function\n\n: Add the handling Function in AppDelegate
translations.如果你測的夠細會發現以上效果，在CollectionView滑動中圖有部分已經滑: If you test carefully, you'll notice that during CollectionView scrolling, when part of the image has already scrolled off-screen, pressing will cause the above situation to occur 😅
translations.如果您需要上滑後在下方加入選項選單請在 **B** 之中加入，是B 是B 是B哦: If you need to add an options menu below after swiping up, please add it inside **B**. It's B, B, B!
translations.我的設定如上圖\n\n: My settings are as shown in the image above.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.由於在 B中 沒有方式能判斷當前是預覽還是真的進入此視窗，所以我們先建立一個Pr: Since there is no way in B to determine whether it is a preview or an actual entry into the view, we first create a Protocol to pass values for this judgment.
translations.這個早在 **iOS 9/iPhone 7之後** 就開始支援的功能，直到我自己: This feature, supported since **iOS 9/iPhone 7**, only became truly useful to me after I switched from an iPhone 6 to an iPhone 8!
translations.這樣我們就能在 B中 做以下判斷：\n\n: This way, we can make the following judgment in B:
translations.這裡將分 **A:列表視窗** 、 **B:目標視窗** 個別列出要實作的程式碼: Here, the implementation code will be listed separately for **A: List View** and **B: Target View**:
translations.關於要加放在哪裡這塊我踩了許多雷，網路有些資料寫viewDidLoad、有的寫在: Regarding where to add it, I encountered many issues. Some online sources say to put it in viewDidLoad, others say in cellForItem, but both places sometimes cause it to fail or only work for some cells.
translations.附圖1 背景虛化保留區示意圖\n\n: Figure 1 Background Blur Reserved Area Illustration
